payload.answer: This looks like a new contextual preference about your morning routine. I can offer options for how to handle it, but I won’t save or merge anything yet.
repair_options: Add this as a separate memory about your morning routine: you usually prefer to read technical papers before checking email.
Keep this only as conversational context and do not store it as a durable memory.
If there is an existing morning routine or reading preference memory, review it first and decide whether this should be added alongside it.
If there is an existing email-checking routine memory, review it first to confirm whether this updates, qualifies, or conflicts with it.
